metadata.name: SANDRA Policy Decision Use Case V1

rules: Policy Decision evaluates authority risk limits and conditions for proposed actions
every decision refers to exactly one originating request
every decision refers to exactly one proposed action
every decision has at least one reason
every decision has an explicit expiry
conditional decisions require approval or explicit limits
request context and limits are deeply immutable
Policy Decision does not execute actions
Policy Decision does not perform transport
Policy Decision does not conclude verification
Policy Decision does not modify Desired State
Policy Decision does not create execution plans
